products.name: Coffee Espresso Machine
products.shortDescription: Professional espresso machine with advanced brewing technology
products.longDescription: Experience café-quality espresso at home with our flagship coffee machine. Featuring precise temperature control, multiple brew settings, and sleek design that complements any kitchen.
highlights: Dual heating system for optimal extraction
Built-in milk frother for cappuccinos and lattes

specs.What's in the box: Espresso machine, portafilter, measuring spoon, tamper, user manual

faq.question: How long does it take to heat up?
faq.answer: The machine heats up in approximately 45-60 seconds.

faq.question: Can I use ground coffee or only pods?
faq.answer: This machine is designed for ground coffee, giving you full control over your brew.

faq.question: Is it easy to clean?
faq.answer: Yes, the drip tray and water tank are removable for easy cleaning.

products.name: Vacuum Jar for Coffee Storage
products.shortDescription: Keep your coffee beans fresh with vacuum-seal technology
products.longDescription: Premium vacuum storage container designed to preserve the freshness and aroma of your coffee beans. Features one-way valve technology and airtight seal.
highlights: Vacuum-seal technology keeps beans fresh longer
Holds up to 500g of coffee beans

specs.What's in the box: Vacuum jar, lid with valve, user manual

faq.question: How does the vacuum seal work?
faq.answer: Simply press down on the lid to create a vacuum seal that locks in freshness.

faq.question: Can I store other items besides coffee?
faq.answer: Yes, it's perfect for tea, nuts, dried fruits, and other dry goods.

products.name: Hand Press Coffee Maker
products.shortDescription: Portable manual coffee press for rich, smooth coffee anywhere
products.longDescription: Compact and portable coffee press perfect for travel, camping, or office. Brew rich, full-bodied coffee with simple hand-press action. No electricity needed.
highlights: Perfect for travel and outdoor use

specs.What's in the box: Hand press coffee maker, travel bag, user manual

faq.question: How much pressure is needed?
faq.answer: Minimal pressure - simply press down steadily for 30-45 seconds.

faq.question: Can I make espresso with this?
faq.answer: It makes concentrated coffee similar to espresso, though not as strong as a machine.

products.name: Fan with Heating & Cooling
products.shortDescription: Multi-function fan with both heating and cooling modes
products.longDescription: Year-round comfort with our innovative 2-in-1 fan. Cool breeze in summer, warm air in winter. Features smart temperature control and energy-efficient operation.

specs.What's in the box: Fan heater, remote control, user manual

faq.question: How quickly does it heat a room?
faq.answer: It can heat a small to medium room (20 sqm) in about 10-15 minutes.

faq.question: Is it safe to leave on overnight?
faq.answer: Yes, it has overheat protection, but we recommend using the timer function.

products.name: Small Mini Refrigerator
products.shortDescription: Compact mini fridge perfect for bedroom, office, or dorm
products.longDescription: Space-saving mini refrigerator with efficient cooling and quiet operation. Ideal for personal use in bedrooms, offices, dorms, or small apartments.

specs.What's in the box: Mini refrigerator, 2 shelves, ice tray, user manual

faq.question: Can it freeze items?
faq.answer: It has a small freezer compartment suitable for ice trays and light freezing.

faq.question: How energy efficient is it?
faq.answer: Very efficient at only 70W, costing minimal electricity to run.

products.name: Digital Air Fryer
products.shortDescription: Healthy cooking with 360° air circulation technology
products.longDescription: Cook your favorite fried foods with up to 80% less fat. Features digital controls, multiple preset cooking programs, and large capacity for family meals.

specs.What's in the box: Air fryer, frying basket, recipe book, user manual

faq.question: Is it easy to clean?
faq.answer: Yes, the basket and tray are non-stick and dishwasher safe.

faq.question: Can I cook frozen food directly?
faq.answer: Absolutely! The air fryer handles frozen foods perfectly.

products.name: Portable Power Box
products.shortDescription: Portable power station for outdoor and emergency use
products.longDescription: High-capacity portable power station perfect for camping, outdoor activities, and emergency backup. Multiple output ports for all your devices.
highlights: Multiple outputs: AC, USB, USB-C, DC

specs.What's in the box: Power station, AC adapter, car charging cable, user manual

faq.question: How many charges can it provide for a smartphone?
faq.answer: Approximately 20-25 full charges depending on phone battery capacity.

faq.question: Can I charge it with solar panels?
faq.answer: Yes, it's compatible with solar panels (sold separately).

products.name: Filter for Fan (Replacement)
products.shortDescription: High-efficiency replacement filter for SHINOBI fans
products.longDescription: Genuine SHINOBI replacement filter designed for optimal air purification. Compatible with our heating & cooling fan models. Easy to install.

faq.question: How often should I replace the filter?
faq.answer: We recommend every 3-6 months depending on usage and air quality.

faq.question: Can I wash and reuse this filter?
faq.answer: Yes, gently vacuum or rinse with water and let dry completely before reinstalling.
